channel.title: CSS on Sara Zan
channel.description: Recent content in CSS on Sara Zan

item.title: CAI Sovico's Website
item.description: Main website: https://www.caisovico.it Since my bachelor studies I have maintained the IT infrastructure of an alpine hut, Rifugio M. Del Grande - R. Camerini. I count this as my first important project, one that people, mostly older and not very tech savvy, depended on to run a real business. The website went through several iterations as web technologies evolved, and well as the type of servers we could afford. Right now it features minimal HTML/CSS static pages, plus a reservations system written on a PHP 8 / MySQL backend with a vanilla JS frontend.
